zh.lifeSummary: 當Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz於1325年5月12日出生在德國貝也安格時，他的父親Adolf von der Pfalz24歲，母親Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine24歲。他於1345年與Beatrice d'Aragon結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1398年1月6日在他的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格海-內卡-可萊斯書額瑙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz于1325年5月12日出生在德国貝也安格时，他的父亲Adolf von der Pfalz24岁，母亲Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine24岁。他于1345年与Beatrice d'Aragon结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1398年1月6日在他的家乡享年72岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格海-內卡-可萊斯書額瑙。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Istvan, Janos, Lajos.
Hungarian (Dér): from the old personal name Dér of Turkic origin, or a nickname for a gray-haired man, from the vocabulary word dér ‘hoarfrost’.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 謝, see   Xie   1.

variants.name: Xie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Hong, Li, Ming, Ying, Min, Qing, Yuan, Bin, Hui, Ping, Wei, Xiaoli, Ding, Chang, Lan, Quan, Cong, Dang, Hai, Tian, Yiping.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 謝, meaning ‘thank’ in Chinese: (i) from Xie (謝), the name of an ancient state (possibly located in Nanyang in Henan province), annexed around the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ).Later this place was probably granted to Shen Bo (the Earl of Shen), uncle of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). After it was annexed during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Zhi-Le (直勒) by Xie Xiaozheng (謝孝政), an official during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Pfalz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German:
habitational name from the Palatinate (German Pfalz), a region in southwestern Germany.

variants.name: Pfalzgraf
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel.

German: status name for the governor or judge at an imperial court, or for someone in the service of such a dignitary, from Middle High German phalenzgrāve. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Pfaltzgraff .

nameMeanings.name: Rupert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Low German form of   Robert  , first brought to England by  Prince Rupert of the Rhine  (  1618–92 ), a dashing military leader who came to help his uncle,  Charles I , in the Civil War. In Britain the name is inextricably linked with the children's comic strip character Rupert Bear, which first appeared in the Daily Express in  1920 .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  ♂ ‘Wondrous’ or ‘enlightenment’.
2  ♀ ‘Fine jade’.

en.lifeSummary: When Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz was born on 12 May 1325, in Amberg, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Adolf von der Pfalz, was 24 and his mother, Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine, was 24. He married Beatrice d'Aragon in 1345. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 January 1398, in his hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in Schönau, Rhein-Neckar-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz est né le 12 mai 1325, à Amberg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Adolf von der Pfalz, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice d'Aragon en 1345. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 janvier 1398, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Schönau, Rhein-Neckar-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.Heidelberg, Seiffen, Kreis Freiberg, Sax: Heidelberg, Seiffen, Kreis Freiberg, Sachsen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz am 12. Mai 1325 in Amberg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adolf von der Pfalz 24 und seine Mutter Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine 24. Er hat 1345 Beatrice d'Aragon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Januar 1398 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Schönau, Rhein-Neckar-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz è nato il il 12 maggio 1325 nel Amberg, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Adolf von der Pfalz, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice d'Aragon nel 1345. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 gennaio 1398, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Schönau, Rhein-Neckar-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalzが1325年5月12日にドイツバイエルンアンバーグで生まれた時，父Adolf von der Pfalzは24歳，母Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhineは24歳であった。1345年にBeatrice d'Aragonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1398年1月6日に故郷で72歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグルヘイン-ネッカー-クレイススチoナウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz(이)가 1325년 5월 12일 독일 베이른 아버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adolf von der Pfalz(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1345년 Beatrice d'Aragon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1398년 1월 6일 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 리이-니c카-크레이스 슈o나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz nasceu em 12 de maio de 1325, em Amberg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Adolf von der Pfalz, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice d'Aragon em 1345. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1398, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Schönau, Rhein-Neckar-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz родился 12 мая 1325 г. в местности эмбирг, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Adolf von der Pfalz было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice d'Aragon в 1345 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 января 1398 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности щoнау, раин-неккар-крис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rupert II von Wittelsbach von der Pfalz nació el 12 de mayo de 1325, en Amberg, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Adolf von der Pfalz, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Beatrice d'Aragon en 1345. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de enero de 1398, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Schönau, Rhein-Neckar-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
